members.name: Mahnoor Khan
members.bio: Actor, designer, researcher, producer. Born Lahore, based in Toronto. Spearheads creative direction with a background spanning theatre, film, policy, and community arts.

members.name: Khayyam Lasi
members.bio: A corporate professional with an artist's heart. Leads artist relationships and community engagement. Dedicates his spare moments to crafting poetry.
